# Ghost Tree Service

> Low-impact tree service for Medina County and Northeast Ohio. 24/7 emergency tree removal, takedowns, trimming and pruning, storm damage cleanup, lot clearing, and utility/commercial work. Heavy enough for the crane jobs, clean enough you'd never know we were there.

## Business
- Name: Ghost Tree Service LLC
- Ownership: family owned and operated
- Phone: (330) 907-6403
- Email: info@ghosttreeservice.com
- Address: 6289 Buffham Rd, Seville, OH 44273
- Hours: 24/7 emergency response
- Rating: 5.0 stars across 48 Google reviews
- Insured; references available on request
- Differentiator: low-impact equipment and thorough cleanup ("we leave like a ghost")
- Service area: Medina County and Northeast Ohio — Medina, Brunswick, Wadsworth, Seville, Lodi, Chippewa Lake, Spencer, Westfield Center, Akron, Bath, Copley, Hudson, Stow, Twinsburg, Rittman, Wooster

## Services
- 24/7 Emergency Tree Removal: https://www.ghosttreeservice.com/services/emergency-tree-removal/
- Tree Removal: https://www.ghosttreeservice.com/services/tree-removal/
- Tree Trimming & Pruning: https://www.ghosttreeservice.com/services/tree-trimming-pruning/
- Storm Damage Cleanup: https://www.ghosttreeservice.com/services/storm-damage-cleanup/
- Lot Clearing: https://www.ghosttreeservice.com/services/lot-clearing/
- Utility & Commercial Accounts: https://www.ghosttreeservice.com/services/utility-commercial/

## Common questions
- Emergency response: Ghost Tree Service answers 24/7 for storm damage and hazard trees across Medina County. Call (330) 907-6403.
- Cost: depends on tree size, location, access, and whether a crane is needed; a clear price is given up front, on site, before any work begins.
- Cleanup: low-impact means the property is protected during the work and left clean afterward — hauled, chipped, and raked.

## Brand position
Come in, solve the tree problem, clean the site, leave minimal trace. Responsive, professional, and local to Medina County.
